Title: Verify Chat Creation and Message Sending
Preconditions: Two users are registered in the system.
Test Data:
- User1: nickname="user1", password="password1"
- User2: nickname="user2", password="password2"
- Chat: id=1, usr1="user1", usr2="user2"
- Message: id=1, chat_id=1, receiver="user2", date="2023-10-01T12:00:00Z", text="Hello!"
Test Steps:
1. Create a chat between User1 and User2.
2. Send a message from User1 to User2.
3. Verify that the message is stored in the database under the correct chat.
Expected Result: Chat is created successfully, and the message is sent and stored correctly.

Title: Verify Message Belongs to Correct User
Preconditions: A chat exists between two users.
Test Data:
- User1: nickname="user1", password="password1"
- User2: nickname="user2", password="password2"
- Chat: id=1, usr1="user1", usr2="user2"
- Message: id=1, chat_id=1, receiver="user2", date="2023-10-01T12:00:00Z", text="Hello!"
Test Steps:
1. Send a message from User1 to User2.
2. Retrieve the message from the database.
3. Verify that the message is associated with User1.
Expected Result: The message is correctly associated with User1.

Title: Verify User Has Many Relations
Preconditions: Multiple users are registered in the system.
Test Data:
- User1: nickname="user1", password="password1"
- User2: nickname="user2", password="password2"
- User3: nickname="user3", password="password3"
- Relation1: chat=1, user="user1"
- Relation2: chat=1, user="user2"
- Relation3: chat=1, user="user3"
Test Steps:
1. Create a chat with three users.
2. Add each user to the chat as a relation.
3. Retrieve the relations from the database.
4. Verify that each user is listed as a relation in the chat.
Expected Result: Each user is correctly added as a relation in the chat.

Title: Verify User Has Many Fridge Associations

2. Associate two fridges with the user.
